Off Calendar Dec-12-2023 Continued To Jan-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Trust Beneficiary Valen Wong To Redress Breach Of The Wendy Fu Trust By Respondent Wanda Lee, Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Continued To Dec-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Geoffrey Murry appeared via zoom for Valen Wong (petitioner).
Azita Rahim appeared via zoom for Wanda Lee (trustee).

Mr. Murry stated that parties are close to reaching an agreement, and that the declaration needs to be signed by his client when she returns from Europe. Amended petition by trust beneficiary Valen Wong etc., is continued to December 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Prieto: Not reported.

Petition By Trust Beneficiary Valen Wong To Redress Breach Of The Wendy Fu Trust By Respondent Wanda Lee, Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Continued To Nov-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Trust Beneficiary Valen Wong To Redress Breach Of The Wendy Fu Trust By Respondent Wanda Lee, Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Continued To Sep-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Amended Petition By Trust Beneficiary Valen Wong To Redress Breach Of The Wendy Fu Trust By Respondent Wanda Lee, Trustee And For Accounting Pursuant To C.C.P. 435 And 436; And To Dismiss Pursuant To C.C.P 581(F)(3); Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Geoffrey Murry appeared by zoom for petitioner.
John Rueppel and Angie Lam appeared by zoom for respondent/trustee.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions in response to the tentative ruling. Ms. Lam's request for sanctions is denied. The court affirms its tentative ruling. The Motion to Strike Amended Petition and to Dismiss Pursuant to CCP section 581(f)(2) is denied.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition By Trust Beneficiary Valen Wong To Redress Breach Of The Wendy Fu Trust By Respondent Wanda Lee, Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Continued To Aug-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Trust Beneficiary Valen Wong To Redress Breach Of The Wendy Fu Trust By Respondent Wanda Lee, Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Continued To Jun-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition By Trust Beneficiary Valen Wong To Redress Breach Of The Wendy Fu Trust By Respondent Wanda Lee, Trustee And For Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Geoffrey Murry, via Zoom, for Valen Wong, Petitioner; John Rueppel and Angie Lam, via Zoom, for Wanda Lee, Respondent.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Respondent Wanda Lee's Demurrer to Petition by Trust Beneficiary Valen Wong to Redress Breach of the Wendy Fu Trust, etc. The court advises that its tentative ruling is to sustain the demurrer with leave to amend.

At the conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Examiner: Elif Sonmez-Kirsch (via Zoom). Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
